fetch_method: curl adopted Written Statement PDF + pdftotext -layout extraction
notes: DM standards are Chapter 12 of the adopted Written Statement (single combined PDF for the whole plan, ~6.4MB, text-based). The PDF uses a TWO-COLUMN layout, so pdftotext interleaves adjacent columns - narrative figures (35/50 units/ha density, 22m separation, 15%/25%/20% open space, 3.5m driveway entrance, four parking zones) were located reliably, but the car parking Table 12.4 and open space Table 12.8 cell-by-cell values are partially scrambled and should be read from the PDF for exact alignment. No fixed plot ratio / site coverage numeric threshold and no rural one-off minimum site area (urban/suburban authority - one-off housing treated as urban-generated).
